title: Extra Select Complete Dry Goldfish Flake Feed, 50 gm + 50 gm Free
features: Complete and balanced flake feed, suitable for all types of goldfish and coldwater fish.
Provides essential nutrients to support growth, vibrant colour, and overall health.
Convenient reusable tub ensures freshness and easy storage for long-term feeding.
Feed up to twice daily for optimal nutrition and healthy, active fish.
Includes 50g + 50g free, offering great value for regular fish feeding.
description: From the manufacturer Our Goldfish and Tropical Flakes Provide an array of quality animal products at good value Cat / Dog Food & Treats Small Animal Food, Treats & Bedding Wild Bird Food, Treats & Feeders Poultry Food & Supplements Fish / Turtle & Terrapin Food Our Indoor Extra Select Fish Food Range The Extra Select range of indoor fish food has been developed to support the full nutritional needs for a whole variety of tanked fish. So whether you're looking for goldfish flakes, or something a little more tropical, we have something to suit your budget. Balanced Formulation Complete Food Ideal for a healthy diet Extra Select Goldfish Flakes The Extra Select Goldfish is a complete food which has a highly digestible and balanced formulation which gives your fish the healthy diet they require. The fish food blend is composed with a variety of vitamins and minerals and come in a variety of different sizes to be suitable for a variety of Goldfish. Feeding Guide It’s important to only feed as much food that can be eaten within a couple of minutes, do not overfeed. We recommend feeding your fish up to 2 times daily.
